content.body:
Scans source files for TODO/FIXME/HACK/NOTE/WHY comments. Only captures
structured comments (>= 20 chars, multiple words). Each produces a
learning draft with AMBIGUOUS confidence. FIXME/HACK entries also
receive a tech-debt tag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add TodoFixmeExtractor with tests
